user.description: Select the Ergostol desk to add.

abort.no_devices_found: No Ergostol desks found. Make sure the desk's Bluetooth adapter is powered and in range of Home Assistant.

init.title: Ergostol Desk options
init.description: Preset heights drive the Sit/Stand buttons. Quiet hours pause background polling so the desk's LED panel stays dark (e.g. overnight) — explicit moves still work; leave both times empty to poll around the clock.
